allow: PowerShell($dll = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nuget\\packages\\microsoft.entityframeworkcore\\8.0.8\\lib\\net8.0\\Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.dll"; Add-Type -Path $dll; [Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Diagnostics.CoreEventId] | Get-Member -Static -MemberType Property | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Required|QueryFilter|Incorrect" } | Select-Object Name)
